title: bursa procumbens
intro: Bursa procumbens, also known as Procumbent Bursage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bursa procumbens include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting digestive health. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often combining it with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
